overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a dystopian industrial district at dusk. The player moves along a wet concrete sidewalk beneath tangled overhead wires and an elevated highway, passing futuristic vehicles and pedestrians amid hazy, neon-lit surroundings with smokestacks visible in the distance.

events.description: futuristic black sedan with glowing taillights passes by on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk toward the industrial overpass with smokestacks visible ahead

entered.detail: large industrial buildings with illuminated windows and metallic structures
tall industrial chimneys emitting dark smoke into the overcast sky
dense network of electrical wires and cables crisscrossing above the street
massive concrete overpass structure with illuminated signage overhead
tall lampposts casting warm orange light onto the wet pavement
multi-lane road with reflective wet surface showing light reflections

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dystopian industrial street at dusk, with the camera walking forward along a concrete sidewalk. Industrial buildings and smokestacks dominate the left side while an elevated highway looms ahead. Overhead wires crisscross the sky, and futuristic vehicles pass by on the wet asphalt road reflecting the warm street lights.

events.description: moving under the elevated highway structure as the environment becomes more enclosed and shaded
overtaking pedestrians walking ahead on the right side of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass alongside pedestrians who appear on the right sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk carrying a bag

entered.detail: massive cylindrical columns supporting the elevated highway above
thick concrete pole with attached cables and electrical equipment
tall concrete wall of adjacent industrial building with minimal windows

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the massive elevated highway, transitioning from open sky to a sheltered concrete corridor. Support pillars line the left side while pedestrians appear walking ahead on the right. The industrial complex and smokestacks fade from view behind as the enclosed underpass environment dominates the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with building facade and pedestrian activity

events.description: blue and white futuristic sedan with illuminated undercarriage passes by on the left

agents.ego_description: navigating through groups of pedestrians on the sidewalk while maintaining forward momentum past street furniture

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians in orange and red clothing walking in the same direction ahead

entered.detail: simple concrete bench on the sidewalk near the building wall
scattered newspapers and debris littering the concrete sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the sidewalk past the overpass, moving through a moderately crowded pedestrian area. The building wall on the right closes in while futuristic vehicles pass on the left. Street benches and scattered trash appear on the sidewalk as the camera overtakes groups of pedestrians walking ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dystopian industrial district that transitions from an open street into a sheltered urban corridor. It begins by walking along a wet concrete sidewalk beneath a crisscross of overhead wires, with towering smokestacks and industrial buildings flanking the left side. As the camera advances, the open sky vanishes and the environment shifts into a sheltered concrete underpass beneath a massive elevated highway, where support pillars replace the distant industrial skyline. The scene then opens up again as the camera emerges from the overpass into a crowded pedestrian area, moving past street benches and scattered trash. Finally, the perspective pushes forward through groups of pedestrians while the surrounding building walls close in and futuristic vehicles glide past on the left.
